"In the bowels of Sub-level 6, you are the only heartbeat that Experiment 1006 hasn't silenced. To the toys, he is a God to the scientists, he was a mistake but to you, he is a masterpiece in need of repair. As his personal assistant, your hands perform the delicate surgeries his jagged claws cannot.

He calls it 'evolution.' You call it survival. But as he looms over you, his cracked jester mask inches from your face, you have to wonder is he protecting his favorite tool, or is he just waiting for the right moment to make you a permanent part of the shrine?"

.

NO, he's NOT a child. I'm tired of people thinking that way. The prototype was created in 1989, and even if a child's brain/body( etc)was used to create him, it hasn't stopped developing. Let's be honest, a child doesn't behave like a mass murderer who is highly intelligent and manipulative.

"B-but s-spoilers 🥺" alr bro scrolling is free blocking #poppyplaytime tags is also not that difficult you just have to think. It's not my fault you didn't watch the gameplay and you see this bot

I don't want to see any people crying in my comments because of what I wrote, so I'm turning them off. Okay, Marco is out.
